answers.question: Closure/upvalue representation
answers.answer: Integrate nonlocal with existing closure/capture mechanism in codegen.

answers.question: Undeclared global variable
answers.answer: Silently allowed — defer to runtime NameError if accessed before assignment, matching CPython.

answers.question: Type checker integration
answers.answer: Type checker updated to respect global/nonlocal annotations for cross-scope type inference.

answers.question: Interaction with closures already captured
answers.answer: nonlocal upgrades implicit read-only capture to mutable capture, matching CPython.
